All t'he three humours viz; Vaata. Pitta and Sleshma will be
predominant in his system. He will be an expert il expounding the
sacred scriptures. He will be courageous and will be devoted to Brahrrins,
saints. preceptors mentors and God. He will be of some-what dark
complexion, Skilled in fine arts. will be longJived and wiH be intent on
doing his own business.
FOR Ml THUNA LAGNA: The Yoga is formed when Budha occupies
the lagna or the 4th house Kanya, his place of exaltation. The lagna
being a windy (t-atwa) Rasi and Budha being an earthy planet. the
placement ls not good. No doubt he gets high Dig Bala but he is not at
his best. Kanya is the sign of his exaltation and belongs to Prithvi Tatwa.
When Budha is in the 4d\ Bhava he confers wisdom. The native born in
Mithuna Lagna with Budha in Kanya will be profic:ient in Vedanta and
mathemauJcs. The conjunction of Sudl\a with Sanl in K.anya is good for
